name: obsidian-tools-server-mobile
description: Embedded Node.js server for the Android APK (bundled via nodejs-mobile)
//: build of sharp that runs on Android (no native binary needed).
platform-specific @img/sharp-* prebuilt that npm downloaded for the
build host (e.g. @img/sharp-linux-x64), leaving only the WASM build.
At runtime, sharp's binding loader finds @img/sharp-wasm32 and uses it.
- chokidar   REMOVED          (uses native fsevents, unavailable on Android;
replaced with a polling watcher in scripts/watcher.js
- node-cron  REMOVED          (cron syntax parsing has issues on Android;
- z-ai-web-dev-sdk kept       (used by chat route; works on Android as it's pure JS)
